description: 支持透明度、遮罩点击关闭

attributes.name: [event]close
attributes.description: Function | 点击遮罩关闭时触发

attributes.name: show
attributes.description: Boolean | 显隐状态 (默认 fasle)

attributes.name: showBlur
attributes.description: Boolean | 开启模糊背景 (默认 false )

attributes.name: blurColor
attributes.description: String | 模糊颜色  (默认 rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.3) )

attributes.name: maskClose
attributes.description: Boolean | 点击遮罩是否关闭 (默认 true)

attributes.name: fixedOpacity
attributes.description: Boolean | 固定透明度  (默认 true)
